item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Chicken bake with vegetables and du puy lentils, served with crispy roasted potatoes and creamy tomato sauce. Topped with fresh pea shoots. (6+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Menudo. Spiced pork stew from the Philippines in a deep umami sauce, served with jasmine rice and spring onions. Served with ensaladong talong. (7+8+15) GREEN DISH: Menudo. Spiced stew with crispy tofu and chickpeas in a deep umami sauce, served with jasmine rice and spring onions. Served with ensaladong talong. (7+8+15) A selection of fresh seasonal vegetables that you can combine with a protein of your choice to create your own meal salad.

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Kebab with welfare chicken, creme fraiche dressing, vegetable salsa and pita bread. Kebab chili served separately. (1+4+6+15) GREEN DISH: dish Crispy falafel with creme fraiche dressing, vegetable salsa and pita bread. Kebab chili served separately. (1+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Crispy fried chicken burger with kimchi mayo, pickled gherkins and the king of salads: crunchy iceberg. (1+2+3+6+11+15) GREEN DISH: dish Juicy vegetarian burger with kimchi mayo, pickled gherkins and the king of salads: crunchy iceberg. (1+2+3+6+11+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Succulent BBQ chicken with crispy golden baked mac and cheese, topped with fresh zucchini salad. Served with BBQ sauce and a flavourful bean salad tossed in tomato vinaigrette with smoked peanuts. (1+4+6+15) GREEN DISH: Dish Juicy BBQ portobello with crispy golden baked mac and cheese, topped with fresh zucchini salad. Served with BBQ sauce and a flavourful bean salad tossed in tomato vinaigrette with smoked peanuts. (1+4+6+15)
